footer.tagline: Your digital platform to simplify daily life in Morocco.

appDownload.title: Your digital concierge in Morocco
appDownload.description: e_conciergerie.ma is much more than a simple platform — it's your digital gateway to everything Morocco has best to offer.

serviceProviders.title: Best Service Providers

trust.title: Trusted by leading brands
trust.subtitle: Join thousands who rely on our network across Morocco.

features.title: Built for everyday convenience
features.subtitle: Everything you need to find, book, and enjoy trusted services.

findServices.title: Find services easily
findServices.description: Browse categories and discover providers near you in a few taps.

bookQuickly.title: Book quickly
bookQuickly.description: Request a slot and confirm details without the back-and-forth.

trustedProviders.title: Trusted providers
trustedProviders.description: Work with vetted partners chosen for quality and reliability.

allInOne.title: All in one place

landingCta.title: Download the app

loginPage.title: Sign in
loginPage.description: Enter your email and password to access your account.

signupPage.title: Sign up
signupPage.description: Create an account. Your password must meet server rules: uppercase, lowercase, number, special character, at least 8 characters.
signupPage.successMessage: Account created. Redirecting to sign in…
signupPage.oauthUnavailable: Google or Apple sign-up is not configured yet.
signupPage.wizardIdentityInvalid: Enter at least 2 characters for first and last name.
